name: Zucchini Mandarin Ada Fhmn87a
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the zucchini into slices.
2. Steam until tender.
3. Add the orange slices and the nutmeg.
4. Sprinkle with the toasted slivered almonds just before serving.
Note: From the ADA Holiday Cookbook by Dr. Betty Wedman, 1 serving = 1/2 fruit exchange + 1/2 fat exchange = 60 Cal, 8 CHO, 2 PRO, 3 Fat, 1 Na, 239 K, 0 Cholest.
